'''Sedan Anang''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[xenobiology]] [[Professor/Legends|professor]] who accompanied author [[Rogar Farnoster]] when he was writing his book ''[[The Slug Named Grendel]]''. Anang was a professor at the [[University of Sanbra]] shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and was one of the few beings who saw the 80-meter [[Exogorth/Legends|space slug]] in the [[Borkeen Belt]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|54|life/1352_2.html|Giant Space Slug Found}} {{1st}}
